query: Synthesize a core findings report based on all clinical trial PDFs in my research library.

comment: Comparing across a large document set
query: Compare the security architectures described in these five technical whitepapers.

comment: Study aid from complex knowledge bases

query: What existing research notebooks and projects do I already have available in my documentation sync?
